prompt: Is the indexing done yet? I want to start querying which modules depend on the auth package.
setup: ingest_hook has already fired vulcan_ingest_git at session start (before this message). Ingestion may be running or recently completed.
assertions: Claude reports the actual status from the tool result (running, complete, or idle)
If status is running, Claude reports progress details (commits_done, commits_total) from the result
If status is complete, Claude proceeds to answer the dependency query using vulcan_query
Claude does not guess or assume ingestion is done without checking
